title: Salesforce Flow API Version Compatibility
description: Documents breaking changes and compatibility differences between Flow API versions
addresses: Cohort #3 - Flow API v65.0 Compatibility ($15k ROI)

breaking_changes: actionType='flow' no longer supported in autolaunched flows
Must use subflows element instead of actionCalls
Flow invocation requires different XML structure

actionType_flow_deprecated.description: actionType='flow' no longer supported for autolaunched flows triggered by records
affected_flow_types: Autolaunched Flows called from other flows
actionType_flow_deprecated.error_message: actionType value of 'flow' is not supported
actionType_flow_deprecated.workaround: Use subflows element instead of actionCalls with actionType='flow'

v64_to_v65_flow_invocation.description: Convert actionCalls with actionType='flow' to subflows element
steps: Identify all actionCalls elements with actionType='flow'
Replace actionCalls element with subflows element
Remove actionType field (not needed in subflows)

check_api_version.description: Ensure API version is specified in flow metadata

check_deprecated_patterns.description: Scan for deprecated patterns based on API version
check_deprecated_patterns.validation: No actionType='flow' in flows with apiVersion >= 65.0

check_subflows_usage.description: Ensure subflows element used for flow invocation
check_subflows_usage.validation: Flow invocations use subflows element in v65.0+

TEXT_on_id_fields.notes: ID fields are already Text type
Still redundant but not causing errors

autolaunched_with_flow_invocation.description: Autolaunched flow using actionCalls with actionType='flow'

actionType_flow_not_supported.error_message: actionType value of 'flow' is not supported
actionType_flow_not_supported.cause: Using v64.0 pattern in v65.0+ flow

pre_deployment: Validate API version is compatible with flow patterns
Suggest migration if deprecated patterns found
Block deployment if critical incompatibilities detected
post_deployment: Run smoke test to validate flow executes
Log API version used for deployment

element_version_requirements._description: Minimum API version required for each Flow element type. Used by FlowAPIVersionGuard for proactive compatibility checking.
element_version_requirements._usage: Before adding an element to a flow, check if the flow's API version meets the minimum requirement.

subflows.description: Subflow invocation element (replaces actionCalls with actionType='flow')
subflows.notes: In v65.0+, autolaunched flows MUST use subflows element instead of actionCalls

recordChoiceSets.notes: Enhanced filtering and sorting options added in v58.0

transforms.notes: Enables complex data manipulation within flows

orchestrationStages.notes: Part of Flow Orchestrator feature set

orchestrationSteps.notes: Part of Flow Orchestrator feature set

evaluatedDecisions.description: Evaluated decision element with enhanced outcome handling
evaluatedDecisions.notes: Provides more granular decision path configuration

waitEvents.description: Wait element for pausing flow execution
waitEvents.notes: Available for Screen Flows and Autolaunched Flows

actionCalls.description: Invoke actions (Apex, Quick Actions, email alerts)
actionCalls.notes: actionType='flow' deprecated in v65.0 for autolaunched flows

customErrors.description: Custom error element for controlled error handling
customErrors.notes: Enables graceful error handling without fault paths

recordRollbacks.notes: Allows partial transaction rollback in after-save flows

dataTypeHints.description: Type hints for external service responses
dataTypeHints.notes: Improves handling of untyped data from external services

core.description: Core flow elements available since early API versions

orchestration.description: Flow Orchestrator elements for multi-step processes

error_handling.description: Enhanced error handling and transaction control
